scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.join('src','templates'),dst=p.join('dist','templates');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f));console.log('copied templates ->',dst)"
